top_signals.title: US Army tests autonomous boats during Philippine exercise
top_signals.summary: Autonomous boats helped escort a U.S. Army vessel during a military exercise, in a demonstration of how uncrewed assets are changing maritime operations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Nissan shareholders vote out director who backed merger with Honda
top_signals.summary: Former Mizuho executive Motoo Nagai fails to receive approval for reappointment after Renault abstains
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sony Plans First Dollar-Bond Sale in Nearly Three Decades
top_signals.summary: Sony Group Corp. was still marketing the original PlayStation when it last tapped the US investment-grade bond market. Almost three decades later, it’s readying a comeback.
